metadata.name: city of shadows why r u mad at all
metadata.author: martin
metadata.source: martin - city of shadows why r u mad at all.milk

perFrameCode: c1 = cos(ran1+dax); c2 = cos(ran2); c3 = cos(ran3+day);
s1 = sin(ran1+dax); s2 = sin(ran2); s3 = sin(ran3+day);
//Coord. Trans. must exactly match def in warp S. !!!!
uvx = reg26*dist/q7; uvy = reg27*dist/q7; uvz = reg28*dist/q7;
uvx += PosX; uvy += PosY; uvz += PosZ;
uvx = len; uvy = ang1; uvz = uvz;
uvx0 = uvx; uvy0 = uvy; uvz0 = uvz;
uvx = if (slen < 0.25, uvx*4, if (slen < 1, uvx/slen, uvx)) *q17 + uvx0;
uvy = if (slen < 0.25, uvy*4, if (slen < 1, uvy/slen, uvy)) *q17 + uvy0;
uvz = if (slen < 0.25, uvz*4, if (slen < 1, uvz/slen, uvz)) *q17 + uvz0;
q4 = PosX; q5 = PosY; q6 = PosZ;
